reason: Verified agent QA-20260512-221601-aqk0 responds correctly to "Hello! What is 2+2?" with answer "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent UI and sidebar visible
Located and identified agent "QA-20260512-221601-aqk0" in the sidebar with status indicator — Agent found in "Your Agents" list
Clicked on agent "QA-20260512-221601-aqk0" in sidebar — Agent detail page opened, showing empty chat interface
Verified agent status is "idle" at top right of page — Status correctly displayed as "idle"
Clicked on message input field with placeholder "How can I help? Press cmd+enter to send" — Input field focused and active
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" into the input field — Message visible in textarea
Clicked the Send message button — Message submitted and page transitioned to chat view
Monitored activity indicator showing "Working..." while agent processed request — Agent status changed to "working"
Waited for response from agent — Agent completed processing in 2 seconds
Verified agent response contains "4" in message list — Response paragraph displays "4" as the correct answer to 2+2
Confirmed new session "Simple Math Question Session" was automatically created in sidebar — Session created and displayed in agent's session list
Verified agent status returned to "idle" after responding — Final status shows "idle" as expected
